name: stylus-nexus
description: Stylus Nexus plugins for Claude Code + Codex.

plugins.name: work-plan
plugins.description: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues. Shared tracks (git-synced .work-plan/), AI clustering (group/auto-triage), coverage, plan-status doc liveness, batched GraphQL fetches. Includes a VS Code viewer with sidebar tree, Mermaid dependency graph, and read/write.
